text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，鉴于数周战争后“互不信任的氛围”，各方并未预期能与美国达成协议。他说：“我们不应指望在一次会议上就达成协议。”他补充说，尽管找到了一些共同点，但在“两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧”。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布，根据双方的联合战略防御协议，已向东部战区的阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地部署了约13,000名巴基斯坦士兵和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。一位巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举措，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对其中一国的攻击将被视为对另一国的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: After 21 hours of negotiations in Pakistan, JD Vance said the U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement. He said the U.S. made its terms clear, but Iran did not accept them.
text_zh: 在巴基斯坦进行了21小时的谈判后，JD·万斯表示美国和伊朗未能达成协议。他称美国已明确了条件，但伊朗并未接受。

text: While the war may resume at any moment, it’s important to reiterate that the U.S. has no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure (terrorism). The world is now starting to feel the effects of the Hormuz blockade, but there’s still another card Iran hasn’t activated yet; the Bab al-Mandeb. Iran’s allies in Yemen (Ansarallah) have already demonstrated their ability to shut down the Bab al-Mandeb Strait from 2023 to 2025 in response to the Israeli genocide in Gaza, which both Biden and Trump attempted to reopen but failed, miserably.
text_zh: 虽然战争可能随时恢复，但必须重申，美国除了轰炸民用基础设施（恐怖主义）之外，已经无牌可打。世界现在开始感受到霍尔木兹海峡封锁的影响，但伊朗还有一张牌尚未激活；那就是曼德海峡。伊朗在也门的盟友（胡塞武装）已经在2023年至2025年期间证明了他们有能力关闭曼德海峡，以回应以色列在加沙的种族灭绝，拜登和特朗普都曾试图重新开放该海峡，但都惨遭失败。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump’s first social media post following failed peace talks with Iran is a link to an article suggesting a possible naval blockade on Iran if it does not comply with U.S. demands. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said it carried out a strike overnight on a Hezbollah rocket launcher in southern Lebanon that was loaded and ready to fire toward Israel. The launcher was identified in the Juwaya area and was destroyed in a rapid strike before it could be launched. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，昨晚对黎巴嫩南部的一个真主党火箭发射器进行了打击，该发射器已装填完毕，准备向以色列发射。该发射器在朱瓦亚地区被发现，并在发射前被迅速摧毁。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump is sharing articles floating a US naval blockade of Iran, the "Venezuela playbook," after talks fail. Here's what that would actually look like. The idea is the US Navy takes control of the Strait of Hormuz and Kharg Island strangling Iran's economy while cutting China and India off from their key oil source simultaneously. The problem: Iran is not Venezuela. 🔸 The strait is only 33km wide at its narrowest point, every ship that enters is within range of Iran's entire coastal arsenal 🔸 Iran's Khalij Fars anti-ship ballistic missiles have a 300km range and are designed specifically to hit moving ships at sea 🔸 Noor and Qader cruise missiles, fired from mobile launchers hidden in coastal caves, cover the entire strait from the Iranian shoreline 🔸 Iran has an estimated 5,000-6,000 naval mines — including influence mines that sit on the seabed and are nearly impossible to detect 🔸 IRGC fast attack swarm boats are designed specifically to overwhelm US destroyers in confined waters — a classified DoD war game found the US lost 16 major warships including a carrier to Iranian swarm tactics 🔸 Iran controls three fortified island outposts (Larak, Qeshm and Abu Musa) sitting directly on the shipping lanes, each with underground bunkers and missile batteries Iran doesn't even need to win a naval battle, FPRI experts note Iran is running an "insurance blockade," it only needs to strike occasionally to make insurance uneconomical for commercial shipping. That alone shuts the strait down. Mine clearance in a contested environment takes a minimum of 4 weeks, and the US has decommissioned most of its dedicated minesweepers in CENTCOM. In 1991 it took 40 ships four months to clear Iraqi minefields in a permissive environment. Meanwhile the USS Gerald R. Ford, cited in the article as leading the blockade, is currently in Split, Croatia being repaired after Iranian strikes. The USS George H.W. Bush is en route as replacement. Trump may be out-blockaded before the blockade even starts. Source . 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普正在分享文章，散布美国对伊朗实施海军封锁的消息，即“委内瑞拉剧本”，此前谈判失败。以下是这实际上会是什么样子。其想法是美国海军控制霍尔木兹海峡和哈尔克岛，扼杀伊朗经济，同时切断中国和印度从其关键石油来源的供应。问题在于：伊朗不是委内瑞拉。 🔸 海峡最窄处仅33公里宽，每艘进入的船只都在伊朗整个海岸武库的射程内 🔸 伊朗的“波斯湾”反舰弹道导弹射程为300公里，专门用于打击海上的移动船只 🔸 从隐藏在海岸洞穴中的移动发射器发射的“努尔”和“卡德尔”巡航导弹覆盖了伊朗海岸线外的整个海峡 🔸 伊朗估计拥有5,000-6,000枚海军水雷——包括放置在海床上且几乎无法探测的感应水雷 🔸 伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击蜂群快艇专门设计用于在狭窄水域压制美国驱逐舰——一份机密的国防部战争游戏发现，美国因伊朗的蜂群战术损失了16艘大型军舰，包括一艘航母 🔸 伊朗控制着三个直接位于航道上的防御岛屿前哨（拉拉克岛、格什姆岛和阿布穆萨岛），每个岛上都有地下掩体和导弹连 伊朗甚至不需要赢得海战，外交政策研究所（FPRI）的专家指出，伊朗正在进行“保险封锁”，它只需要偶尔进行打击，使商业航运的保险变得不经济。仅此一项就足以关闭海峡。在有争议的环境中进行扫雷至少需要4周时间，而美国已经退役了中央司令部的大部分专用扫雷舰。1991年，40艘船花了四个月时间才在许可的环境中清理了伊拉克的雷区。与此同时，文章中提到的领导封锁的“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号航空母舰目前正在克罗地亚斯普利特进行维修，此前遭到了伊朗的打击。“乔治·H·W·布什”号航空母舰正在途中作为替代。特朗普可能在封锁开始前就被反封锁了。来源。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational stance toward the European Union. Magyar, running as the main opposition challenger backed by the TISZA Party, has positioned himself as a reformist figure calling for institutional change and a tougher stance on corruption. Polling stations are set to close at 7 p.m. local time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利全国大选投票已经开始，总理维克托·欧尔班在执政16年后正面临挑战者彼得·马扎尔。欧尔班领导着执政党青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对欧盟的对抗立场建立了他的纲领。作为由TISZA党支持的主要反对派挑战者，马扎尔将自己定位为改革派人物，呼吁进行制度变革并对腐败采取更强硬的立场。投票站定于当地时间晚上7点关闭。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Al Mayadeen analyst Musa Assi: Vance's uranium/nuclear weapons excuse is "very weak and cannot be believed." Iran has repeatedly said it doesn't want nuclear weapons and is ready to reduce enrichment to very low levels for civilian use. Everyone is convinced Iran does not have the intention to produce a nuclear weapon. The real reasons for failure: 1. Israel succeeded in sabotaging negotiations by insisting on continuing the war on Lebanon, violating the ceasefire that Trump had agreed to as a precondition. 2. The US chose "Israel first" not "America first." Vance called Trump ten times in 21 hours, showing he lacked full authority. The American negotiating team chose Israeli interests over American interests and peace. Failure may take us back to before the ceasefire. The military option is still on the table. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 阿尔马亚丁电视台分析师穆萨·阿西：万斯关于铀/核武器的借口“非常软弱，令人难以置信”。伊朗一再表示不想要核武器，并准备将浓缩铀水平降低到极低水平以供民用。每个人都确信伊朗没有制造核武器的意图。谈判失败的真正原因：1. 以色列坚持继续对黎巴嫩的战争，违反了特朗普作为先决条件同意的停火协议，从而成功破坏了谈判。2. 美国选择了“以色列优先”而不是“美国优先”。万斯在21小时内给特朗普打了十次电话，显示他缺乏完全的授权。美国谈判团队选择了以色列的利益，而不是美国的利益和和平。失败可能会让我们回到停火前。军事选项仍然摆在桌面上。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：伊朗没有听从你们关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: These negotiations took place after 40 days of imposed war and were conducted in an atmosphere of mistrust and suspicion; it is natural that we should not have expected to reach an agreement in just one session…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Baghaei: I thank the government and people of Pakistan, and personally Mr. Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, Mr. Asim Munir, Army Commander, and Mr. Ishaq Dar, Deputy Prime Minister. We thank them for their warm hospitality and are confident that contacts between us and Pakistan and our other friends in the region will continue. Diplomacy stands alongside the defenders of the homeland and we are ready for all kinds of sacrifices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人：这些谈判是在40天的强加战争后进行的，是在互不信任和怀疑的氛围中进行的；我们不应指望在一次会议上就达成协议，这是很自然的……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖伊：我感谢巴基斯坦政府和人民，特别感谢巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫先生、陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔先生和副总理伊沙克·达尔先生。我们感谢他们的热情款待，并相信我们与巴基斯坦以及我们在该地区的其他朋友之间的联系将继续下去。外交与保卫家园的卫士站在一起，我们已做好一切牺牲的准备。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei, responding to a Washington Post report: At a time when American officials accuse Iran of bad faith and blackmail, circles within US policy making and media openly call for the assassination of Iranian…" Pakistan must be on high alert and make sure the Iranian delegation returns home safely. The Wall Street Journal piece wasn't some crazy talk, it was a direct threat
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊回应《华盛顿邮报》报道：在美国官员指责伊朗不诚实和勒索的同时，美国决策圈和媒体公开呼吁暗杀伊朗……” 巴基斯坦必须保持高度警惕，确保伊朗代表团安全回国。《华尔街日报》的文章不是疯话，而是直接的威胁

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Esmail Baghaei, following talks with the U.S.: We reached an understanding on a number of issues, but on 2-3 important topics, the views differed and ultimately the talks did not lead to an agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: These negotiations took place after 40 days of imposed war and were conducted in an atmosphere of mistrust and suspicion; it is natural that we should not have expected to reach an agreement in just one session from the start. No one had such an expectation either. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊在与美国会谈后：我们就一些问题达成了谅解，但在2-3个重要议题上，观点存在分歧，最终谈判未能达成协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人：这些谈判是在40天的强加战争后进行的，是在互不信任和怀疑的氛围中进行的；从一开始就不指望在一次会议上达成协议是很自然的。也没有人有这样的期望。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Pakistani Defense Minister following Islamabad talks: Several rounds of intense and constructive negotiations continued for twenty-four hours between US Vice President JD Vance and Iranian Parliament Speaker Qalibaf, mediated by Pakistan's Field Marshal Asim Munir. Pakistan expresses gratitude to both sides for appreciating its mediatory role. "We hope that the two sides continue with the positive spirit to achieve durable peace and prosperity for the entire region and beyond. It is imperative that the parties continue to uphold their commitment to ceasefire." Pakistan will continue facilitating engagement and dialogue between Iran and the United States in the days to come. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦国防部长在伊斯兰堡会谈后表示：在美国副总统JD·万斯和伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫之间进行了多轮紧张且具有建设性的谈判，谈判持续了24小时，由巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔调解。巴基斯坦感谢双方对其调解作用的认可。“我们希望双方继续保持积极精神，为整个地区及其他地区实现持久和平与繁荣。各方必须继续履行其停火承诺。”巴基斯坦将在未来几天继续促进伊朗和美国之间的接触与对话。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷 Pakistan’s Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar issues a statement after Vice President J.D. Vance says talks between the U.S. and Iran have failed, expressing gratitude to both sides for recognizing Pakistan’s role in helping achieve the ceasefire. Dar says…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Esmail Baghaei, following talks with the U.S.: We reached an understanding on a number of issues, but on 2-3 important topics, the views differed and ultimately the talks did not lead to an agreement. @ wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷 巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔在美国副总统JD·万斯表示美伊谈判失败后发表声明，感谢双方承认巴基斯坦在帮助实现停火方面的作用。达尔说……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊在与美国会谈后：我们就一些问题达成了谅解，但在2-3个重要议题上，观点存在分歧，最终谈判未能达成协议。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on Iran wanting to controi the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：美伊在一些问题上存在分歧，包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡和浓缩铀库存。 推文

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 The ongoing Iran-US negotiations in Pakistan ended unsuccessfully after a 21-hour active meeting. The parties failed to reach an agreement. The main reason for the disagreement was again Iran's nuclear program and the issue of opening the Strait of Hormuz. US Vice President Jade Wency states that the Iranians did not show readiness to reach an agreement, primarily on the nuclear issue. Meanwhile, the Iranian side claims that the American side's demands were excessively maximalist and unrealistic. The American delegation has already left Pakistan. It is still unknown whether military actions against Iran will resume, as a few minutes ago, Trump stated that whether or not there is an agreement, America has already won and Iran's military capabilities are completely destroyed. He also added that the Strait of Hormuz will be opened very soon. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 正在进行的伊朗-美国巴基斯坦谈判在21小时的积极会议后以失败告终。双方未能达成协议。分歧的主要原因再次是伊朗的核计划和开放霍尔木兹海峡的问题。美国副总统JD·万斯表示，伊朗人在核问题上没有表现出达成协议的意愿。与此同时，伊朗方面声称美国方面的要求过于最大化且不切实际。美国代表团已经离开巴基斯坦。目前尚不清楚针对伊朗的军事行动是否会恢复，因为几分钟前，特朗普表示，无论是否有协议，美国都已经赢了，伊朗的军事能力已被彻底摧毁。他还补充说，霍尔木兹海峡很快就会开放。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on is Iran wanting to control the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Pakistan’s Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar issues a statement after Vice President J.D. Vance says talks between the U.S. and Iran have failed, expressing gratitude to both sides for recognizing Pakistan’s role in helping achieve the ceasefire. Dar says it is “imperative” that the ceasefire holds and urges continued engagement, adding Pakistan will keep facilitating dialogue between both sides. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 Axios：美伊在一些问题上存在分歧，包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡和浓缩铀库存。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔在美国副总统JD·万斯表示美伊谈判失败后发表声明，感谢双方承认巴基斯坦在帮助实现停火方面的作用。达尔表示，停火必须维持，并敦促继续接触，并补充说巴基斯坦将继续促进双方之间的对话。 @wfwitness

text: ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - The US negotiators have departed Pakistan after talks with Iran fell apart.
text_zh: ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 美国谈判代表在与伊朗的会谈破裂后已离开巴基斯坦。

text: 🎥 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - The American delegation led by Vance is departing the Serena Hotel in Islamabad for Nur Khan airbase to fly back to U.S.
text_zh: 🎥 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 由万斯率领的美国代表团正在离开伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店，前往努尔汗空军基地飞回美国。

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "‘Iran has decided to reject our demands’ – J.D. VanceThis here is exactly the problem with America. They demand, they impose, they enforce. They do not ‘negotiate’. They are not a good faith actor.Iran won’t accept bullying. It will fight the Zionist-American alliance for another 10 years if it has to."
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“‘伊朗决定拒绝我们的要求’ – JD·万斯 这正是美国的问题所在。他们要求，他们强加，他们执行。他们不‘谈判’。他们不是善意的参与者。伊朗不会接受欺凌。如果必须的话，它将与犹太复国主义-美国联盟再战10年。”

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Intense smoke is seen rising from Dahieh, close to Burj Al Barajneh area. The cause is not yet clear. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 可以看到达希耶（Dahieh）附近，靠近布尔吉·巴拉吉内（Burj Al Barajneh）地区升起浓烟。原因尚不清楚。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Enjoy your weekend - and here's all the key news of the past 24 hours you maybe missed ➡️ Russian fighters get ready for Orthodox Easter ➡️ Sane residents of Odessa celebrate the city's liberation from the Nazis ➡️ Russia and Ukraine have carried out an exchange of prisoners of war, and Russia returned its last civilian hostages Ukrainians had kidnapped from the Kursk region ➡️ Iran and the US held negotiations in Pakistan. That went about as well as most people expected - the Iranian side called them "not merely dialogue and negotiation, but rather a demand ", and no agreement was reached , JD Vance says that the nuclear issue is the one the sides can't agree on . Here's the Iranian take on the whole thing ➡️ Netanyahu claims Israel is "strangling" Iran, Iraq, and Yemen ➡️ Trump threatens China over reports that they are supplying Iran with MANPADS 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 享受你的周末 - 以下是你可能错过的过去24小时的所有关键新闻 ➡️ 俄罗斯战士为东正教复活节做准备 ➡️ 敖德萨的理智居民庆祝城市从纳粹手中解放 ➡️ 俄罗斯和乌克兰进行了战俘交换，俄罗斯归还了乌克兰从库尔斯克地区绑架的最后一名平民人质 ➡️ 伊朗和美国在巴基斯坦举行了谈判。结果正如大多数人预期的那样 - 伊朗方面称它们“不仅仅是对话和谈判，而是要求”，没有达成任何协议，JD·万斯表示核问题是双方无法达成一致的问题。这是伊朗对此事的看法 ➡️ 内塔尼亚胡声称以色列正在“扼杀”伊朗、伊拉克和也门 ➡️ 特朗普就有关中国向伊朗提供便携式防空导弹（MANPADS）的报道威胁中国 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Full statement from JD Vance following 21 hours of talks in Islamabad: "We have not reached an agreement, and I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States." Vance says the US made clear its red lines and what it would accommodate — Iran chose not to accept US terms. The core issue: "We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon." He claims Iran's enrichment facilities "have been destroyed" but says the US hasn't seen "a fundamental commitment of will for the Iranians not to develop a nuclear weapon, not just now, not just two years from now, but for the long term." Talks collapse. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡进行21小时会谈后的完整声明：“我们没有达成协议，我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。”万斯表示，美国明确了其红线以及可以容纳的内容 - 伊朗选择不接受美国的条件。核心问题：“我们需要看到一个肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速获得核武器的工具。”他声称伊朗的浓缩铀设施“已被摧毁”，但表示美国没有看到“伊朗人不仅现在、不仅两年后，而且从长远来看不发展核武器的基本意志承诺。”谈判破裂。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on is Iran wanting to control the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯关于美国在谈判中提出的建议：我们在这里留下了一个非常简单的提议。一种理解的方法，这是我们最终且最好的提议。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：美伊在一些问题上存在分歧，包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡和浓缩铀库存。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim: The ball is in the United States' court, and Iran is not in a hurry in the negotiations. As long as the United States does not agree to a reasonable deal, there will be no change in the situation of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：球在美国一边，伊朗在谈判中并不着急。只要美国不同意达成合理的协议，霍尔木兹海峡的局势就不会有任何改变。
